---
title: Determining the best method to visualize UBC gene expression
date: 2024-06-27
metadata-files: 
  - _metadata.yml
  - ../_quarto.yml
---

# Goal of this analysis

1. Check to see if normalizing before or after merging datasets makes a difference.

# Files and directories

## Input

CCA RL file is found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs`

## Output

The output can be found at `/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240627`

# Process and Results

Using the `scrnaseq_env` conda environment

Lets load in the required libraries
```{r eval=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(Seurat)
library(qs)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(patchwork)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(circlize)
```

Loading in the Seurat object
```{r eval=FALSE}
out_directory <- "/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240627"
rl_cca <- qread("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240618/rl_cca.qs")
```

Lets take a look to see if normalizing before or after merging makes a difference.
```{r eval=FALSE}
DefaultAssay(rl_cca) <- "RNA"

ald <- subset(rl_cca, subset = dataset_name == "Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human")
sepp <- subset(rl_cca, subset = dataset_name == "Sepp_full_cerebellum_human")

merge_norm <- merge(ald, sepp) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    GetAssayData(slot = "data")

ald_norm <- NormalizeData(ald, assay = "RNA")
sepp_norm <- NormalizeData(sepp, assay = "RNA")
norm_merge <- merge(ald_norm, sepp_norm, merge.data = TRUE) %>%
    GetAssayData(slot = "data")
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
> identical(merge_norm, norm_merge)
[1] TRUE
```

Subsetting the human UBCs
```{r eval=FALSE}
# First subset human cells, then subset for UBC cells, then normalize, find the variable features, and scale data
ubc_cells <- rl_cca %>%
  subset(subset = species == "human") %>%
  subset(subset = broad_cell_type == "UBC") 
```

Finding the common genes in the UBCs between datasets
```{r eval=FALSE}
DefaultAssay(ubc_cells) <- "RNA"

ald <- subset(ubc_cells, subset = dataset_name == "Aldinger_full_cerebellum_human")
sepp <- subset(ubc_cells, subset = dataset_name == "Sepp_full_cerebellum_human")

counts_ald <- GetAssayData(object = ald, slot = "counts")
nonzero_ald <- counts_ald > 0
keep_ald_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_ald) >= 10
ald_genes <- rownames(ald)[keep_ald_genes]

counts_sepp <- GetAssayData(object = sepp, slot = "counts")
nonzero_sepp <- counts_sepp > 0
keep_sepp_genes <- Matrix::rowSums(nonzero_sepp) >= 10
sepp_genes <- rownames(sepp)[keep_sepp_genes]

intersecting_genes <- intersect(ald_genes, sepp_genes)  
```

Lets try scaling the whole thing and plotting the results.

Preparing the Aldinger dataset first
```{r eval=FALSE}
ald <- subset(ald, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA") %>%
    ScaleData(vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")

# Randomly sample 1000 cell names
#set.seed(1)
#ampled_cells <- sample(colnames(ald), 2000)
#ald_cells <- subset(ald, cells = sampled_cells)
ald_cells <- ald

# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ald_data <- GetAssayData(ald_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
ald_data_matrix <- ald_data[VariableFeatures(ald), ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters")
ald_metadata <- ald_cells@meta.data[, columns]

ald_metadata <- factor(ald_metadata, levels = unique(ald_metadata))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ald_metadata),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ald_metadata <- fct_relevel(ald_metadata, levels(ald_metadata)[levels_index])

# Remove genes that although are variable have 0 expression within the cells
  # Mainly for when randomly sampling
ald_data_matrix <- ald_data_matrix[rowSums(ald_data_matrix != 0) > 0, ]
```

Now the Sepp dataset
```{r eval=FALSE}
sepp <- subset(sepp, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA") %>%
    ScaleData(vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")

# Randomly sample 1000 cell names
#set.seed(1)
#sampled_cells <- sample(colnames(sepp), 2000)
#sepp_cells <- subset(sepp, cells = sampled_cells)
sepp_cells <- sepp

# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
sepp_data <- GetAssayData(sepp_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "scale.data")
sepp_data_matrix <- sepp_data[VariableFeatures(sepp), ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters")
sepp_metadata <- sepp_cells@meta.data[, columns]

sepp_metadata <- factor(sepp_metadata, levels = unique(sepp_metadata))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(sepp_metadata),
  numeric = TRUE
)
sepp_metadata <- fct_relevel(sepp_metadata, levels(sepp_metadata)[levels_index])

# Remove genes that although are variable have 0 expression within the cells
  # Mainly for when randomly sampling
sepp_data_matrix <- sepp_data_matrix[rowSums(sepp_data_matrix != 0) > 0, ]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "scale_data_dataset_heatmap.png"),width=35,height=20,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
cluster_palette <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ald_metadata)), "Dark2")
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ald_metadata)

# Column annotations
ald_column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ald_metadata,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

sepp_column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = sepp_metadata,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(3, "RdBu")
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(-1, 0, 1), heatmap_col)

ald_heatmap <- Heatmap(ald_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = ald_column_annotation,
    width = unit(15, "in"), height = unit(15, "in"),
    row_title = "Variable Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "Aldinger UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 6,
    column_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

sepp_heatmap <- Heatmap(sepp_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = sepp_column_annotation,
    width = unit(15, "in"), height = unit(15, "in"),
    row_title = "Variable Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "Sepp UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 6,
    column_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

heatmap_list <- ald_heatmap + sepp_heatmap

draw(heatmap_list, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend))

dev.off()
```

![It appears that we can group the cells into catagories](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240627/scale_data_dataset_heatmap.png)

Lets try plot the data slot. Also trying if we can get the variable features from the combined instead.

Finding the VariableFeatures
```{r eval=FALSE}
variable_features <- ubc_cells %>%
    subset(features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA")
```

Preparing the Aldinger dataset first
```{r eval=FALSE}
ald <- subset(ald, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA") %>%
    ScaleData(vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")

# Randomly sample 1000 cell names
#set.seed(1)
#ampled_cells <- sample(colnames(ald), 2000)
#ald_cells <- subset(ald, cells = sampled_cells)
ald_cells <- ald

# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ald_data <- GetAssayData(ald_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")

# add comment
feats <- c(VariableFeatures(variable_features), "EOMES", "LMX1A")
ald_data_matrix <- ald_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters")
ald_metadata <- ald_cells@meta.data[, columns]

ald_metadata <- factor(ald_metadata, levels = unique(ald_metadata))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ald_metadata),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ald_metadata <- fct_relevel(ald_metadata, levels(ald_metadata)[levels_index])

# Remove genes that although are variable have 0 expression within the cells
  # Mainly for when randomly sampling
ald_data_matrix <- ald_data_matrix[rowSums(ald_data_matrix != 0) > 0, ]
```

Now the Sepp dataset
```{r eval=FALSE}
sepp <- subset(sepp, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA") %>%
    ScaleData(vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")

# Randomly sample 1000 cell names
#set.seed(1)
#sampled_cells <- sample(colnames(sepp), 2000)
#sepp_cells <- subset(sepp, cells = sampled_cells)
sepp_cells <- sepp

# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
sepp_data <- GetAssayData(sepp_cells, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
sepp_data_matrix <- sepp_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters")
sepp_metadata <- sepp_cells@meta.data[, columns]

sepp_metadata <- factor(sepp_metadata, levels = unique(sepp_metadata))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(sepp_metadata),
  numeric = TRUE
)
sepp_metadata <- fct_relevel(sepp_metadata, levels(sepp_metadata)[levels_index])

# Remove genes that although are variable have 0 expression within the cells
  # Mainly for when randomly sampling
sepp_data_matrix <- sepp_data_matrix[rowSums(sepp_data_matrix != 0) > 0, ]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "data_dataset_heatmap.png"),width=40,height=20,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
cluster_palette <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ald_metadata)), "Dark2")
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ald_metadata)

# Column annotations
ald_column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ald_metadata,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

sepp_column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = sepp_metadata,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(4, "Blues")
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(0, 1, 2, 3), heatmap_col)

ald_heatmap <- Heatmap(ald_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = ald_column_annotation,
    width = unit(15, "in"), height = unit(15, "in"),
    row_title = "Variable Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "Aldinger UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 6,
    column_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

sepp_heatmap <- Heatmap(sepp_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = sepp_column_annotation,
    width = unit(15, "in"), height = unit(15, "in"),
    row_title = "Variable Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "Sepp UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 6,
    column_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    row_dend_reorder = TRUE,
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,
    show_heatmap_legend = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

heatmap_list <- ald_heatmap + sepp_heatmap

draw(heatmap_list, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend))

dev.off()
```

![It appears that we can group the cells into catagories](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240627/data_dataset_heatmap.png)

```{r eval=FALSE}
all_ubc <- subset(ubc_cells, features = intersecting_genes) %>%
    NormalizeData(assay = "RNA") %>%
    FindVariableFeatures(nfeatures = 100, assay = "RNA") %>%
    ScaleData(vars.to.regress = "CC.Difference", assay = "RNA")

p <- VariableFeaturePlot(all_ubc)
top_genes <- VariableFeatures(all_ubc)[1:15]
plot <- LabelPoints(plot = p, points = top_genes, repel = TRUE) + theme_classic()
ggsave(filename = "variable_feature.png", plot = plot, path = out_directory, 
        width =10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

# Extract the RNA assay data from the data slot and convert to matrix
ubc_data <- GetAssayData(all_ubc, assay = "RNA", slot = "data")
feats <- c(VariableFeatures(all_ubc), "EOMES", "LMX1A")
ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data[feats, ] %>%
    as.matrix()

# Extract the metadata
columns <- c("new_clusters","dataset_name")
ubc_metadata <- all_ubc@meta.data[, columns]

ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- factor(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$new_clusters))
levels_index <- str_order(
  levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters),
  numeric = TRUE
)
ubc_metadata$new_clusters <- fct_relevel(ubc_metadata$new_clusters, levels(ubc_metadata$new_clusters)[levels_index])

ubc_metadata$dataset_name <- factor(ubc_metadata$dataset_name, levels = unique(ubc_metadata$dataset_name))

# Remove genes that although are variable have 0 expression within the cells
  # Mainly for when randomly sampling
ubc_data_matrix <- ubc_data_matrix[rowSums(ubc_data_matrix != 0) > 0, ]
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
png(file.path(out_directory, "ubc_heatmap.png"),width=25,height=20,units="in",res=600)

# Setting colour pallette
cluster_palette <- brewer.pal(length(levels(ald_metadata)), "Dark2")
names(cluster_palette) <- levels(ald_metadata)

# Column annotations
dataset_palette <- c("#66C2A5", "#FC8D62")
names(dataset_palette) <- levels(ubc_metadata$dataset_name)

# Column annotation
column_annotation <- HeatmapAnnotation(
  Group = ubc_metadata$new_clusters,
  Dataset = ubc_metadata$dataset_name,
  col = list(
    Group = cluster_palette,
    Dataset = dataset_palette
  ),
  show_legend = c(
    "Group" = FALSE,  
    "Dataset" = FALSE  
  ),
  show_annotation_name = FALSE
)

cluster_legend <- Legend(labels = names(cluster_palette), 
    title = "UBC Subclusters", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = cluster_palette))

dataset_legend <- Legend(labels = names(dataset_palette), 
    title = "Datasets", 
    title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
    title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
    grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
    grid_height = unit(1, "in"),
    legend_gp = gpar(fill = dataset_palette))

# Heatmap
heatmap_col <- brewer.pal(4, "Blues")
col_fun = colorRamp2(c(0, 1, 2, 3), heatmap_col)

ubc_heatmap <- Heatmap(ubc_data_matrix,
    col = col_fun,
    top_annotation = column_annotation,
    width = unit(15, "in"), height = unit(15, "in"),
    row_title = "Variable Genes", row_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_title = "UBC Cells", column_title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 20, fontface = "bold"),
    column_km = 6,
    column_dend_reorder = FALSE,
    row_dend_reorder = FALSE,
    row_names_side = "left",
    show_row_names = TRUE,  
    show_column_names = FALSE,  
    heatmap_legend_param = list(
        title = "Gene Expression",
        title_gp = gpar(fontsize = 10, fontface = "bold"),
        title_position = "leftcenter-rot",
        grid_width = unit(0.5, "in"),
        legend_height = unit(6, "in")))

draw(ubc_heatmap, 
    ht_gap = unit(1, "in"),
    heatmap_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_side = "right", 
    annotation_legend_list = list(cluster_legend, dataset_legend))

dev.off()
```

![It appears that we can group the cells into catagories](/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/llau/results/integrated/20240627/ubc_heatmap.png)

```{r eval=FALSE}
genes = c("RBFOX1", "FOXP2", "EYS", "TMTC2","GNB3", "GRIK1")

tumour_srat <- readRDS("/.mounts/labs/pailab/private/icheong/CBL_scRNAseq/results/tumour/Vladoiu/20230510/mb_mnn.rds")

for(gene in genes){
  feature_plot <- FeaturePlot(object = rl_cca, features = gene, order = TRUE, min.cutoff = "q10", max.cutoff = "q90", raster = FALSE) 

  feature_plot_name <- paste0(gene, ".png")
  ggsave(filename = feature_plot_name, plot = feature_plot, path = out_directory, 
        width =10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
  
  feature_plot <- FeaturePlot(object = tumour_srat, features = gene, order = TRUE, min.cutoff = "q10", max.cutoff = "q90", raster = FALSE) 

  feature_plot_name <- paste0(gene, "_tumour.png")
  ggsave(filename = feature_plot_name, plot = feature_plot, path = out_directory, 
        width =10, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
}
```

## Genes of interest for UBC_1

RBFOX1: More highly expressed in UBC_1 compared to everything else. RBFOX1 regulates both splicing and transcriptional networks in human neuronal development (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pmc/articles/PMC3441119/). Also expressed in Group 4 Medulloblastoma (Only one sample).

TMTC2: Protein binds both the calcium uptake pump SERCA2B and the carbohydrate-binding chaperone calnexin, and it appears to play a role in calcium homeostasis in the ER (https://www.genecards.org/cgi-bin/carddisp.pl?gene=TMTC2).

FOXP2: FOXP2 mRNA expression pattern suggests that the basic neural network that underlies speech and language may include motor-related circuits, including frontostriatal and/or frontocerebellar circuits (https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK7023/). Is also a transcription factor (https://humantfs.ccbr.utoronto.ca/myTFPageUniversal.php?user=&eID=ENSG00000128573&dbd=&submit_param=submit_value).

EYS: Photoreceptor marker. Also expressed in Group 3 medulloblastoma. (https://www.nature.com/articles/s41586-022-05208-9)
